name: irfanabduhu
description: Distill books, web writings, video, and academic papers into elegant presentations and reading guides

plugins.name: readweave
plugins.description: Distill books, web writings, video, and academic papers into elegant presentations and reading guides. Includes /read (single book), /master (CS/technical book with active recall + code slides), /study (multi-book), /paper (single academic paper), /survey (multi-paper research thread), /digest (web article), /crawl (blog index), /watch (YouTube video), and /playlist (YouTube playlist) commands.
